description: Brandfolder is a digital asset management platform for organizing, managing, and distributing brand assets such as files, attachments, collections, and metadata. It is part of Smartsheet’s product portfolio and supports programmatic access to Brandfolder resources.
summary: Brandfolder exposes a REST API at `https://brandfolder.com/api/v4` authenticated with a personal API key, plus a documented GraphQL endpoint at `https://graphql.brandfolder.com/graphql` whose auth requirements are not publicly documented in the pages reviewed.
